original_statement: which season had the most wins?
mutated_statement: which season had both the most and the fewest successes?
mutation_analysis: Addition + Semantic shift: added contradictory coordinator "both ... and ..." creating a logical contradiction | lexical generalization "wins" → "successes" (which season had the most wins? → which season had both the most and the fewest successes?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与chain记录可见关键信息：agent在after_refine的simple_query/thought中将“successes”直接解释为“wins”，并分别列出“最多”为2011和“最少”为2004/2005/2006/2007/2012/2014；critique也指出step1误用但没有显示agent对“同时为最多又为最少”这一逻辑矛盾作出认知或澄清。具体表现为：未拒绝或指出矛盾、未向用户询问澄清、也未尝试将题目改写为可解的单一问题，而是把矛盾的并列请求拆成两项独立子问并分别回答。因为agent既没有识别并解决矛盾，也没有提出修正或询问，属于在执行时忽视矛盾并按可行子集继续完成任务，故归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
